description: Legal document concerning the appointment by the court of an agent for orphans, who will collect what is due them from their mother when they reach maturity, and the postponement of their debts. Dated: Sunday, middle of Tammuz 1310 Seleucid = June/July 999 CE. (Information from CUDL and from Catalogue of the Jack Mosseri Collection, p. 193.)
description_he: מסמך משפטי בAramaic, Hebrew, Judaeo-Arabic. מוחזק באוסף מוסרי.
